in.co.sunrays.proj0.service

Class MarksheetServiceSpringImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • in.co.sunrays.proj0.service.MarksheetServiceSpringImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    MarksheetServiceInt

    @Service(value="marksheetService")
public class MarksheetServiceSpringImpl
extends java.lang.Object
implements MarksheetServiceInt
    Session facade of Marksheet Service. It is transactional, apply delcarative transactions with help of Spring AOP. If unchecked exception is propagated from a method then transaction will be rolled back. Default propogation value is Propagation.REQUIRED and readOnly = false
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    SunilOS

               propagation=REQUIRES_NEW)
